data.name: Settings.General.LauncherThemeDescription
data.value: Visual style of the radial menu

data.name: Settings.General.SettingsThemeDescription
data.value: Visual style of this configuration window

data.name: Settings.General.SlotsPerPageDescription
data.value: Adjust the number of action slots displayed per page. Higher values allow more actions but create smaller trigger regions. Changes take effect after saving.

data.name: Settings.General.CleanCacheDescription
data.value: Removes icon cache for processes not seen in the last 30 days (blacklisted processes are never removed).

data.name: Settings.Slots.AddSlotHint
data.value: Add a slot to start customizing this menu.

data.name: Settings.Plugins.Description
data.value: Manage plugin lifecycle, health, and configuration

data.name: Settings.Plugins.InstallFromFileTooltip
data.value: Install a plugin from a local ZIP file

data.name: Settings.Plugins.InstallHint
data.value: Click 'Install from File' to add plugins from ZIP packages

data.name: Settings.Marketplace.Description
data.value: Discover and install plugins to extend Pulsar's functionality

data.name: Settings.Marketplace.InstallFromFileTooltip
data.value: Install a plugin from a local ZIP file

data.name: Settings.Marketplace.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search plugins by name, author, or tags...

data.name: Settings.Marketplace.AdjustSearch
data.value: Try adjusting your search or filters

data.name: Settings.ExternalPlugins.Description
data.value: Install and manage plugins from local ZIP files

data.name: Settings.ExternalPlugins.InstallFromFileTooltip
data.value: Install a plugin from a local ZIP file

data.name: Settings.ExternalPlugins.InstallHint
data.value: Click 'Install from File' to add plugins from ZIP packages

data.name: Settings.ExternalPlugins.AboutLine1
data.value: • External plugins are loaded from ZIP files and installed to your local AppData folder

data.name: Settings.ExternalPlugins.AboutLine2
data.value: • Built-in plugins (PKI, WinSwitcher, etc.) are managed in the

data.name: Settings.ExternalPlugins.AboutLine5
data.value: • After installation, restart Pulsar to load the new plugin

data.name: Settings.ExternalPlugins.AboutLine6
data.value: • Uninstalling a plugin requires a restart to complete removal

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.SwitchHint
data.value: Need something else? Switch to Advanced to pick any plugin and full parameter model manually.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ChooseBehaviorDesc
data.value: Choose the primary behavior for this slot, then fill in the details that make it work.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.AdvancedDesc2
data.value: Start from common intent and refine manually.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.AdvancedDesc3
data.value: Choose a plugin type and action directly.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ChooseTypeHint
data.value: Choose a slot type to unlock actions and required details.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.CompleteSetupHint
data.value: Complete the required setup, then adjust label, icon, or color if you want extra polish.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.PreviewHint
data.value: Preview badges and setup status update as you shape the slot.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ScanTypes
data.value: Scan the available slot types to find the behavior you need.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ChooseOutcome
data.value: Choose the outcome you want, and we'll guide you through the required details.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.DisclosureHint1
data.value: Select a slot type before adjusting appearance.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.DisclosureHint2
data.value: Keep the suggested presentation or make small refinements to the label, color, and icon.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ScenarioSwitchAppDesc
data.value: Switch to a running app without typing its name.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ScenarioOpen
data.value: Open Program, File, Folder, or URL

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ScenarioOpenDesc
data.value: Open something through the default handler.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ScenarioSendKeysDesc
data.value: Send a key sequence or paste text into the active window.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ScenarioFillCredentialDesc
data.value: Fill a saved credential into the active field.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.ChooseTypeBegin
data.value: Choose a slot type to begin.

data.name: Dialog.SlotConfig.UpdateBehavior
data.value: Update the slot's behavior first to refresh the preview.

data.name: Dialog.SlotConfig.MetadataHint
data.value: Action, validation, and summary details stay anchored here while you edit.

data.name: Dialog.SlotConfig.AppearanceHint
data.value: Keep the suggested presentation or make small refinements to the label, color, or icon.

data.name: Dialog.SecretPicker.PickHint
data.value: Pick an existing credential or create a new one for this PKI slot.

data.name: Dialog.SecretPicker.CreateHint
data.value: Create your first secret now, then link it to this slot immediately.

data.name: Dialog.SecretPicker.DeleteConfirmFormat
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete '{0}'? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Dialog.PluginLogViewer.ExpandRange
data.value: Try expanding the time range or clearing search.

data.name: Dialog.QuickSecrets.LeaveBlankHint
data.value: Leave blank to keep current password

data.name: Dialog.ProcessBlacklist.SelectProcesses
data.value: Select processes to exclude from the window switcher:

data.name: Dialog.IconPicker.UploadCustomTooltip
data.value: Use a custom image file as icon

data.name: Notification.SaveError
data.value: Failed to save changes. Please try again.

data.name: Notification.ResetConfirmBody
data.value:
This will restore Pulsar to its first-launch state, recreate the default profiles, and restart onboarding eligibility.

A backup of your current configuration will be created before reset.
Are you sure you want to proceed?

data.name: Notification.ResetCompleteBody
data.value: Pulsar has been restored to its first-launch defaults. Saved profiles and custom configuration have been removed. A backup has been created in the user data folder.\n\nThe application needs to restart to complete the reset.

data.name: Notification.PluginLogsOpenFailed
data.value: Failed to open plugin logs folder.

data.name: Notification.ConfirmDeleteSlotFormat
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove '{0}' from Slot {1}?

data.name: Notification.ConfirmDeleteProfileFormat
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete profile '{0}'?

data.name: Notification.UnsavedChangesBody
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save before closing?

data.name: Notification.CleanCacheBody
data.value: This will remove cached icons for processes not seen in the last 30 days (blacklisted processes are never removed).\n\nAre you sure you want to proceed?

data.name: Notification.CacheCleanedBody
data.value: Expired icon cache has been removed.

data.name: Notification.InstallCompleteBody
data.value: Plugin has been installed successfully.\n\nPlease restart Pulsar to load the plugin.

data.name: Notification.InstallFailedFormat
data.value: Failed to install plugin from file:\n\n{0}

data.name: Notification.InstallErrorFormat
data.value: An error occurred while installing the plugin:\n\n{0}

data.name: Notification.ConfirmUninstallFormat
data.value: Are you sure you want to uninstall {0}?\n\nThis will remove all plugin files.

data.name: Notification.UninstallCompleteFormat
data.value: {0} has been uninstalled successfully.\n\nPlease restart Pulsar to complete the removal.

data.name: Notification.OnlinePluginsDeprecated
data.value: Online plugin installation is not implemented.\n\nPlease use 'External Plugins' page to install plugins from ZIP files.

data.name: Notification.OnlineUpdatesDeprecated
data.value: Online plugin updates are not implemented.\n\nPlease manually download and install the latest version from 'External Plugins' page.

data.name: Notification.DeprecatedMessage
data.value: This feature is deprecated. Please use 'External Plugins' page to install plugins from files.

data.name: Notification.DeprecatedManageMessage
data.value: This feature is deprecated. Please use 'External Plugins' page to manage plugins.

data.name: Validation.FormatMismatch
data.value: Value does not match the required format.

data.name: Validation.PathMinLengthFormat
data.value: Path must be at least {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.PathMaxLengthFormat
data.value: Path must be at most {0} characters.

data.name: Validation.SelectAtLeastOne
data.value: Please select at least one option.

data.name: Tutorial.WelcomeDesc
data.value: Your setup wizard already created a starter configuration. Now let's learn the two modes that make Pulsar fast.

data.name: Tutorial.SwitchMode
data.value: Switch Mode: app switching and launching

data.name: Tutorial.SwitchModeDesc
data.value: Press Ctrl+Q to open Switch Mode. Pick any app tile to jump straight to it — no alt-tabbing, no typing.

data.name: Tutorial.FirstSwitchDesc
data.value: Choose any generated app slot from Switch Mode. Pulsar activates that app and tracks that you know how to navigate.

data.name: Tutorial.CommandModeDesc
data.value: Press Ctrl+Shift+Q to open Command Mode. Here you'll find quick actions like opening settings or running scripts.

data.name: Tutorial.FirstCommandDesc
data.value: Choose any generated command slot from Command Mode. Pulsar executes the action and unlocks the next step.

data.name: Tutorial.OnboardingCompleteDesc
data.value: You completed the minimum onboarding path. Pulsar is now set up and ready to accelerate your daily workflow.

data.name: Feedback.ActionUnavailableHelp
data.value: Wait a moment and try again.

data.name: Feedback.ActionFailedHelp
data.value: Try again or review the slot settings.

data.name: Feedback.AppSwitchedBody
data.value: The app was brought to the front successfully.

data.name: Feedback.InputSentBody
data.value: The keys or text were sent to the active app.

data.name: Feedback.CredentialFilledBody
data.value: The saved credential was sent to the active app.

data.name: Feedback.FixSlotSetupBody
data.value: This app slot needs updated settings before it can run.

data.name: Feedback.FixSlotSetupHelp
data.value: Open the slot and verify the app name or launch path.

data.name: Feedback.AppNotAvailableBody
data.value: Pulsar could not find a running app to switch to.

data.name: Feedback.AppNotAvailableHelp
data.value: Open the app first or add a launch path to this slot.

data.name: Feedback.SwitchFailedBody
data.value: Pulsar could not switch to that app.

data.name: Feedback.SwitchFailedHelp
data.value: Try again after the app is ready.

data.name: Feedback.FixCommandSlotBody
data.value: This command slot is missing required settings.

data.name: Feedback.FixCommandSlotHelp
data.value: Open the slot and fill in the missing value.

data.name: Feedback.InputFailedBody
data.value: Pulsar could not send the keys or text to the active app.

data.name: Feedback.InputFailedHelp
data.value: Make sure the target app is focused, then try again.

data.name: Feedback.OpenFailedBody
data.value: Pulsar could not open the configured target.

data.name: Feedback.OpenFailedHelp
data.value: Check that the target exists and try again.

data.name: Feedback.FixCredentialSlotBody
data.value: This credential action needs an updated saved secret before it can run.

data.name: Feedback.FixCredentialSlotHelp
data.value: Open the slot and choose a valid saved credential.

data.name: Feedback.CredentialFillFailedBody
data.value: Pulsar could not send the saved credential to the active app.

data.name: Feedback.CredentialFillFailedHelp
data.value: Focus the target field and try again.

data.name: Feedback.CredentialFillFailed2Body
data.value: Pulsar could not complete the credential action.

data.name: Feedback.CredentialFillFailed2Help
data.value: Try again after the target app is ready.

data.name: Feedback.FixBookmarkletSlotBody
data.value: This bookmarklet slot needs a valid script file to run. Pulsar can only inject scripts that are saved as files.

data.name: Feedback.FixBookmarkletSlotHelp
data.value: Open the slot and verify the configured script path.

data.name: Feedback.BookmarkletFailedBody
data.value: Pulsar could not inject the bookmarklet into the browser.

data.name: Feedback.BookmarkletFailedHelp
data.value: Wait for the page or browser address bar to finish loading, then try again.

data.name: Feedback.BookmarkletFailed2Body
data.value: Pulsar could not complete the bookmarklet action.

data.name: Feedback.BookmarkletFailed2Help
data.value: Make sure the browser is ready, then try again.

data.name: FirstLaunch.GeneralProductivityDesc
data.value: Start with everyday apps and simple command examples.

data.name: FirstLaunch.BrowserDocsDesc
data.value: Focused on browsing, note-taking, and quick lookups.

data.name: FirstLaunch.SetupDescription
data.value: Choose how you plan to use Pulsar, and we'll create the right starter configuration for you.

data.name: FirstLaunch.SetupHint
data.value: Select at least one app. Up to six apps will be used as Switch Mode starter slots.

data.name: FirstLaunch.Footer
data.value: Generated defaults create standard editable slots in your global profile. You can change everything later.

data.name: FirstLaunch.SelectScenarioError
data.value: Please select a usage scenario first.

data.name: FirstLaunch.SelectAppError
data.value: Please select at least one launch app to generate defaults.

data.name: Tutorial.DescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: This is the tutorial description text

data.name: Tutorial.AutoContinue
data.value: It will continue automatically after completing the action. If it doesn't continue automatically, you can click "Continue".

data.name: Tutorial.WaitHintDefault
data.value: It will continue automatically after completing the action. If it doesn't continue automatically, you can click "Continue".

data.name: PluginPermission.ReadWindowInfoDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to read basic window information (process name, PID, window handle)

data.name: PluginPermission.ReadProcessPathDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to read the full path of the target process

data.name: PluginPermission.ShowNotificationDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to display system notification messages

data.name: PluginPermission.ReadClipboardDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to read clipboard content

data.name: PluginPermission.WriteClipboardDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to modify clipboard content

data.name: PluginPermission.ReadSelectedTextDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to read currently selected text

data.name: PluginPermission.ReadProcessWindowsDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to get the list of all windows for the target process

data.name: PluginPermission.SimulateKeyboardDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to simulate keyboard input

data.name: PluginPermission.SimulateMouseDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to simulate mouse operations

data.name: PluginPermission.StartProcessDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to start external programs

data.name: PluginPermission.KillProcessDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to terminate processes (dangerous operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.ReadFileSystemDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to read the file system

data.name: PluginPermission.WriteFileSystemDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to write to the file system (dangerous operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.AccessRegistryDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to access the Windows Registry (dangerous operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.AccessEnvironmentDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to access environment variables

data.name: PluginPermission.AccessCredentialsDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to read passwords from the PKI credential manager (sensitive operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.ModifyCredentialsDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to add/delete credentials (sensitive operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.AccessNetworkDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to initiate network requests

data.name: PluginPermission.ExecuteNativeCodeDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to execute native code (dangerous operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.LoadAssemblyDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to dynamically load external assemblies (dangerous operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.ModifyConfigurationDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to modify Pulsar configuration

data.name: PluginPermission.RegisterHotkeyDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to register global hotkeys (system-level operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.ModifyPluginRegistryDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to modify the plugin registry (system-level operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.AccessAllServicesDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to access all dependency injection services (system-level operation)

data.name: PluginPermission.BypassPermissionCheckDesc
data.value: Allows plugin to bypass permission checks (core plugins only)

data.name: Plugin.CircuitBreakerBody
data.value: Plugin '{0}' has been temporarily disabled for {1} seconds due to repeated crashes to protect the main program.

data.name: Tutorial.NoActionDetectedHint
data.value: No action detected — you can click "Continue" to skip, or "Previous" to go back and try again.

data.name: Bookmarklet.Error.MissingScriptPath
data.value: Missing required parameter: scriptPath. Please check plugin configuration.

data.name: Bookmarklet.Error.UnsafePath
data.value: Script path contains unsafe characters or attempts to access restricted directories.

data.name: Bookmarklet.Error.EmptyScript
data.value: Script content is empty. Please check if the file is correct.

data.name: Bookmarklet.Error.FileNotFound
data.value: Script file not found: {0}. Please confirm the file exists.

data.name: Bookmarklet.Error.NoBrowser
data.value: No running browser detected. Please open a browser window first.

data.name: Bookmarklet.Error.AddressBarNotReady
data.value: Browser address bar temporarily not ready to accept bookmarklet script. Please wait for the page or browser to finish loading and try again.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.CardSwitchAppDesc
data.value: Switch to a running app without typing its name.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.CardOpenTargetDesc
data.value: Open a program, file, folder, or URL.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.CardSendKeysDesc
data.value: Send key sequences or paste text into the active window.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.CardFillSecretDesc
data.value: Fill a saved credential into the active field.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.CardRunScriptDesc
data.value: Execute a script or automation routine.

data.name: Dialog.AddSlot.CardSystemDesc
data.value: Open settings or manage quick-add profiles.
